headline: Will CONMED’s New CFO Shift CNMD’s Financial Playbook Or Deepen Its Existing Strategy?
summary: On June 17, 2026, CONMED Corporation announced that John E. Gallagher will become Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and principal financial and accounting officer from July 15, 2026, succeeding Todd Garner, who will remain in an advisory role until November 2, 2026. Gallagher’s nearly three decades of finance leadership across healthcare and industrial companies, including senior roles at Certara, Cue Health, and Becton Dickinson, signals a refreshed approach to CONMED’s...
